Table of Contents

Interface IRemapFilter

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control a remap filter.

[Guid("2F07BE89-35D7-4CF3-BE0D-2F13E56948F0")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IRemapFilter

Properties

AllowUnmatched

Indicates if unmatched values should be passed through.

bool AllowUnmatched { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

ClassCount

The number of remapped classes.

int ClassCount { get; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

Methods

AddClass(double, double, double)

Adds a remap class that remaps values in [minvalue,maxvalue) to a give new value.

void AddClass(double minvalue, double maxvalue, double newvalue)

Parameters

minvalue double
maxvalue double
newvalue double

Examples

Sample Snippet

AddNoDataClass(double, double)

Adds a remap class that remaps values in [minvalue,maxvalue) to NoData.

void AddNoDataClass(double minvalue, double maxvalue)

Parameters

minvalue double
maxvalue double

Examples

Sample Snippet

Empty()

Removes all classes.

void Empty()

Examples

Sample Snippet

PutClass(int, double, double, double)

Puts a remap class at a given class index (starting from 0).

void PutClass(int Index, double minvalue, double maxvalue, double newvalue)

Parameters

Index int
minvalue double
maxvalue double
newvalue double

Examples

Sample Snippet

QueryClass(int, out double, out double, out double)

Queries a remap class at a given class index (starting from 0).

void QueryClass(int Index, out double minvalue, out double maxvalue, out double newvalue)

Parameters

Index int
minvalue double
maxvalue double
newvalue double
